v0.2.0.description:
Added support for Burger Shop 2! The setup process is similar to Burger Shop 1 and the associated files include "Burger Shop 2" in the name.

### Burger Shop 1
See the [setup guide](https://github.com/zsiegel701/Archipelago/blob/burger-shop/worlds/burger_shop/docs/setup_en.md) for full installation and connection instructions.
See [this page](https://github.com/zsiegel701/Archipelago/blob/burger-shop/worlds/burger_shop/docs/en_Burger%20Shop.md) for details on what is randomized.

### Burger Shop 2
See the [setup guide](https://github.com/zsiegel701/Archipelago/blob/burger-shop/worlds/burger_shop_2/docs/setup_en.md) for full installation and connection instructions.
See [this page](https://github.com/zsiegel701/Archipelago/blob/burger-shop/worlds/burger_shop_2/docs/en_Burger%20Shop%202.md) for details on what is randomized.

### Additional Changes
- Removed the "user_" prefix when logging that a file was found.
- Only update the level count when an Archipelago save file is detected to prevent messing with existing save files.
v0.2.0.title: Burger Shop v0.2.0

v0.2.1.description: - Removed "Peas and Carrots" which will now be unlocked by receiving "Peas" and "Carrots" individually.  This avoids the issue of having too many items in the item pool when the maximum number of items are generated.
v0.2.1.title: Burger Shop v0.2.1

v0.2.2.description:
- Removed extra recipes from being added to the item pool when starter recipes are enabled
- Added extra handling for profile names containing non-standard characters

Only the .apworld files are changed in this release
v0.2.2.title: Burger Shop v0.2.2
